name: ocp5-cluster-update-experience
description: OpenShift Container Platform 5.x Cluster Update UX prototype (Vite/React/TypeScript): manual and agent-based update flows, demo variants (OCP 5.1 dual-path vs OCP 5.0 agent-only), Installed Operators table aligned with cluster update, bulk operator approval, column management, OpenShift Lightspeed pre-check entry points, and ecosystem operator routes.
